content.full_text:
January 15, 1990

Ms. Alice Hughes
Fair Political Practices Commission
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0814

Dear Alice:

This letter requests informal assistance under Government Code, Section 83114(b). I am requesting this advice as a person with a duty to advise other persons relating to their duties under the Political Reform Act ("the Act"). (2 California Code of Regulations, Section 18329(c)(1)).

This is to confirm our recent telephone discussion in which you stated that a Supplemental Pre-election Campaign Statement (Form 495) need not be filed in connection with a $5,000 contribution made by a recipient committee to a candidate in a special election scheduled for January 30, 1990. The committee made a $5,000 contribution in December 1989. You stated that no Form 495 is necessary since the relevant recipient committee will be filing regular reports during the first six months of 1990. The committee only has to file its regular Recipient Committee Campaign Statement (Form 420).

Please feel free to contact us if you have any questions regarding this request.

Sincerely,

Cary Davidson

CD:lb
